name: Mom's Basic White Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the yeast to one side of the inner pan.
2. Add the remaining ingredients in the order given.
3. Select white bread and press "start".
4. Wait until this perfect golden brown loaf is ready to eat.
This can be mixed on manual of the bread machine.
5. After the second kneading, remove the dough for the machine,
divide into two equal portions and place in small loaf pans.
6. Cover and let rise for double, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
